'''âng-y-b-dh''' ('''kangaybedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hammerfist|hammerfist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hammerfist|hammerfist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-y-b-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kangaybedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingaybedhoko|thingaybedhoko]] || [[word:jingaybedhoko|jingaybedhoko]] || [[word:shingaybedhoko|shingaybedhoko]] || [[word:kingaybedhoko|kingaybedhoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
